dict.string: Oxy uses your location to help with ride booking, directions, and local recommendations.
Oxy uses background location for useful reminders such as arriving near home.
Oxy uses Apple Music to play songs and add music to your library or playlists when you ask.
Oxy uses the microphone for voice input so you can talk instead of typing.
Oxy uses speech recognition to convert your voice into text messages.
Oxy reads basic HealthKit summaries like heart rate, sleep, and steps for proactive briefings.
Oxy uses contacts to prepare native message and FaceTime handoffs.
Oxy uses reminders to help create native Apple Reminders when you ask.
Oxy uses Calendar to create native events when you ask.
Oxy uses Calendar to create native events when you ask.
